sent_simp: 出国前她去银行换了一些外汇。
sent_trad: 出國前她去銀行換了一些外匯。
pinyin: Chū guó qián tā qù yínháng huàn le yīxiē wàihuì.
english: Before going abroad, she went to the bank to exchange some foreign currency.

sent_simp: 两个人结婚后感情很好，经常爱爱。
sent_trad: 兩個人結婚後感情很好，經常愛愛。
pinyin: Liǎng gè rén jiéhūn hòu gǎnqíng hěn hǎo, jīngcháng ài ài.
english: The two of them have a great relationship after getting married and make love often.
